chapter_title.en: Chapter on Emancipation and Its Rulings

text: 3441 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "لاَ عِتْقَ إِلاَّ مَا أُرِيدَ بِهِ وَجْهُ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3441 - Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as):
"There is no valid emancipation except that which is done sincerely for the sake of Allah (swt), the Mighty and Majestic."
